name: Crops Corporation
summary: Crops Corporation engages in the sale and service of mobile phones through stores in Japan. As of September 1, 2020, it operated 46 stores. The company is also involved in the temporary staffing, building maintenance, security management, restaurant leasing, wholesale of stationery packaging material, and planning and wholesale of imported stationery. Crops Corporation was founded in 1977 and is headquartered in Nagoya, Japan.
